creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
From what I've seen:

/boot/kernel/hwpmc.ko:
                 U dpcpu_off
                 U pcpu_entry_pmc_sampled

does not cause problems (because pcpu_entry_pmc_sampled
is defined in /boot/kernel/kernel instead of being
dynamically loaded).

So I've removed hwpmc.ko from the summary.
